message:
feat: migrate compaction worker from std threads to asupersync runtime and harden extension source scanning

Replace the std::sync::mpsc channel and thread-based compaction worker
with asupersync JoinHandle and futures oneshot channel. The try_recv()
method becomes async, start() returns a Result so callers can report
failures via AgentEvent::AutoCompactionEnd, and abort() uses a oneshot
sender for cooperative cancellation instead of thread detachment.

Harden collect_js_like_files_recursive() to propagate errors from
unreadable directories and directory entries instead of silently
skipping them. This ensures fail-closed behavior when extension source
trees contain inaccessible paths.

Add tests: analyze_unreadable_nested_directory_fails_closed verifies
preflight rejects extensions with permission-denied subdirectories,
and compatibility_scanner_scan_path_fails_on_unreadable_nested_dir
confirms the scanner propagates the error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
